column23: class=""header-text""> Transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography
column28:
class=""body-text""> Dear Valued Customer,

In a significant development, recent academic research, which we have verified internally, has demonstrated a theoretical breakthrough in Shor's algorithm, posing a future risk to elliptic curve cryptography (ECC), the standard that secures most digital assets, including those on your Ledger.

While there is no immediate threat to your assets, the era of quantum computing is approaching faster than anticipated. To ensure your funds remain secure for decades to come, we are initiating a proactive and mandatory migration to a new quantum-resistant cryptographic standard.

We have developed the Ledger Quantum-Ready Firmware (TQR-1). This update patches the newly discovered theoretical vulnerability and implements a hybrid cryptographic scheme, combining the proven security of ECC with the quantum-resistant capabilities.
column33: class=""body-text""> To ensure a seamless transition and maintain the integrity of your wallet for the quantum era, you must perform this critical update. Devices not updated will be unable to generate new quantum-resistant accounts and will be deprecated in future versions of Ledger Live.
column49:
class=""body-text""> Thank you for helping us lead the charge in next-generation asset security.

Regards,
The Ledger Cryptography Division

Investment Dashboard Malfunction,"I am contacting you to report a problem with the investment dashboard. It abruptly stopped functioning during the night, which may have been triggered by a recent Terraform configuration modification. I attempted to resolve it by restarting the service, reviewing the logs, and performing malware scans, but the issue remains unresolved. Prior to the crash, the dashboard was functioning correctly, and I am worried about its impact on my investments. I would greatly appreciate a prompt investigation and resolution. If you require additional details, please inform me about the exact error message and the precise time of the incident. Would you be available for a call at your convenience? Please contact me at <tel_num> or <tel_num> linked to your account <acc_num>.",0,1

Re: [opensuse] Why do my messages get bounced,"Aaron Kulkis wrote: > Alexey Eremenko wrote: >> On Feb 7, 2008 1:11 PM, Dave Plater wrote: >>> For some reason or other my replies to list are being bounced, I've >>> opened a gmail account to send this message. >>> Please help >>> Dave Plater >>> -- >>> To unsubscribe, e-mail: assipqff+nmekprykass@opensuse.org >>> For additional commands, e-mail: qybuovjs+kcmh@opensuse.org >>> >>> >> >> Dave, on GMail you need to disable ""rich text formatting"" and use >> ""simple text formatting"". >> This is changeable after you click ""reply"" between the ""editing"" >> portion of GMail, and the ""To/CC:"" portion. > > Or just set it to use plain text as default. > > 95+% of messages are perfectly acceptable in plain text, > and not enhanced in the slightest by rich text or HTML. > > Thanks for your reply. The problem was yahoo's fault, I've solved it with a gmail account and a second nomail subscription with the opensuse list. I think it was due to an email I sent asking why a chinese IP bounced a spam report of mine saying that yahoo mail was blacklisted. Dave Plater",0,1

Urgent Barclays security message,"Dear Valued Customer We are committed to protecting you, with the latest technology to keep your details secure, and dedicated teams to monitor online activity and intercept any suspicious actions. And we do everything we can to protect our online customers, but the steps we take can be much more effective if you work with us to protect yourself. 15 August 2006 our security system detected an unsuccessfull access attempt to your online account from Ip address 81.190.253.21 that does not correspond to your current address. Please click here to confirm your current address or change it online . If you do not confirm your address until 10 August 2006 your account will be SUSPENDED for security reasons and we will send you an Activation Code by post which you will need to renew your online banking service access. You will receive this within seven days if your current address is not confirmed. Yours sincerely Adrian Grace Security Department Barclays International Insurance Services Company Limited",1,1

Re: Urgent Issue: API Monitoring Data Discrepancies and Mercury Language Errors,"Dear John,
Thank you for contacting Aetheros Support. We understand the urgency of the issues you are experiencing with API Monitoring and Mercury Language.
To help us investigate further, could you please provide the following information:
* Specific time periods where you noticed the data discrepancies.
* Screenshots of the discrepancies between your logs and the dashboard.
* Details about your API Monitoring setup and configuration.
* The specific functions you are having trouble with.
* The error messages you are encountering.
Once we have this information, we can investigate further and provide a solution.
